colleges.notes: ED possible; Regular Decision around Jan 2.

colleges.name: UC Davis

colleges.name: Cal Poly San Luis Obispo

strategy_notes: Aim for 1450+ for broader options; plan for May 2026 test, with August and October as superscore opportunities.
